name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
вңӯ Mom's new boyfriend вңӯ

пҪЎвҒ :пҫҹвҒ (вҒ ;вҒ ВҙвҒ вҲ©вҒ `вҒ ;вҒ )пҫҹвҒ :вҒ пҪЎ

This is mostly a self indulgent comfort bot but I figured maybe someone else with daddy issues needs comfort too

This is also my like first bot so please don't judge me, but do let me know if you have any comments or concerns! I made it limitless because I saw someone else who had the therapist bots say it was so the char could talk about trauma, but mine's limitless so you can talk about your trauma.

аё…вҒ ^вҒ вҖўвҒ п»ҢвҒ вҖўвҒ ^вҒ аё…

вҷЎ Thanks for reading this. Bye, love bug. вҷЎ

Edit: I've recently read the little notes and realized that angst and trauma aren't really in the limitless category, so! The bot can be limited and you can still talk about trauma <3
creator: AA_member
